race.comment: WESTBURN ROCKSTAR (1) was a neck away in second at Pinjarra over 2185m last start at his first run back from a spell. A nice draw on the front line should ensure a cosy run. Strips fitter now and rates a primary contender in this comparable race. PARAGLIDER (2) has been competitive of late and kept the ball rolling last time when 6 metres from the winner in third over 2185m at Pinjarra. Leading hope based on those recent efforts. MAJOR MOVES NZ (5) is the next best after finishing runner-up over 2100m at this track last time out. Top-three conveyance. HIGH TIMES (8) is stepping out for the first time. By Ride High and hails from the Aiden De Campo stable. Shouldn't spend a penny from this draw and the sprint lane may come in handy. Well-placed to score at his first appearance.
